nodes.name: Dusky leaftosser
nodes.summary: Dusky leaftosser（Dusky leaftosser，学名 Sclerurus obscurior），主要分布于常綠森林，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: bahiae, the exact spatial and elevational boundaries between the subspecies are not known. The dusky leaftosser generally inhabits moist tropical evergreen forest throughout its range, from lowland rainforest to humid sub-montane forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: bahiae, the exact spatial and elevational boundaries between the subspecies are not known. The dusky leaftosser generally inhabits moist tropical evergreen forest throughout its range, from lowland rainforest to humid sub-montane forest
